description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits HELLO twice in one wire session.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the duplicate HELLO because the seed already established the wire session.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the duplicate-HELLO session violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a session-establishment negative interop case beyond BYE-after-close and pre-HELLO WANT handling.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects a second HELLO before the rest of the transcript.
